title: amelanchier ovalis subsp. ovalis
intro: Amelanchier ovalis subsp. ovalis, also known as the dwarf or oval-leaved shadblow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Amelanchier ovalis subsp. ovalis can be prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
